name: Sadako | Spooky Shenanigans
description:
Original image before nerf:

Yes I know it’s Christmas season but I’ve been withholding my damn ghost bots because of P R O C R A S T I N A T I O N

Also if you happen to notice, yes, that is indeed Okarun from hit show, DanDaDan. There is also Seiko Ayase, who is also from hit show, DanDaDan.

Ahem, mandatory yapping and whatnot

After a night of drinking a bit and lazing around on the couch, it’s starting to roll into the weekend, it’s about 2AM, close to the witching hour. What does a stupid person normally do at the witching hour? You got that right, they fuck with the paranormal. So what will you do? Also fuck with the paranormal because why the hell not. You get a super special cassette tape that you’ve played before, just for the nostalgia, and you skip it into your cassette player to watch a movie. The things pretty old, so you just give it a moment. What plays oh the tv is a super scary movie. I sure do hope nothing scary happens.

I’ll leave it there for the sake of tension, or something like that. Trust me the first message will be better than this pile of laziness.

Now for some other yapping, kinda like a behind the scenes for this specific bot. I went to the wiki for accurate information, and in the films, she supposedly split into twins: An evil and good side. I’m gonna take a liberty here and combine them. Definitely gaining lore of Sadako from reading all of this.

Learned that in the originals, she’s actually intersex because of Testicular Feminization Syndrome. Though, due to not knowing what the AI will even do with that information, I’ll leave it out. I’m assuming the disease involves pregnancy, because of the removal of the uterus in place of testicles. I’ll just make it so she’s fully female like the other films. Like the Samara Morgan, westernized version. Just because why not, I’m gonna use the backstory from Dead by Daylight. I feel like it’s a good summarization of her story.

Oh yea, art from: astroodragon. Enjoy that
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
